# Upstream IDP-fusion

Vendored from `https://github.com/gaofeng21cn/IDP-fusion`.

- Commit: `052ac4f868fd416e10165ef4891804d25edc8862`
- Branch at import time: `master`
- Import purpose: preserve the original Python 2 IDP-fusion algorithm used by the historical analysis.

Do not modernize files under this directory unless a change is explicitly documented as a compatibility patch. Prefer wrappers in `idp_beta/`.
